title: Layer 2B - Store / PageIndex sub-port contract
description: Pages-in / ranked-passages-out, plus the progressive-disclosure resolver. The second of Layer 2B's two ports (the other is format.schema.json). The store is ephemeral and holds NO content cap: full Markdown is stored verbatim and recoverable by id. The default adapter is SQLite FTS5 over an in-memory connection (Python stdlib, zero third-party install, built-in BM25); a pure-Python in-memory BM25 adapter is the fallback when FTS5 is not compiled into the local SQLite. Persistence is the presence of persist_path (otherwise identical behavior). vector and tantivy are named in the adapter enum but are opt-in, not part of the base install.

adapter.description: Index backend. sqlite-fts5 (default) and memory (the pure-Python BM25 fallback) require zero third-party packages. sqlite-vec/tantivy are opt-in adapters honoring the same shapes.

persist_path.description: null => in-memory (ephemeral). A path => persistence; behavior is otherwise identical (WAL is enabled for a file-backed SQLite).

cache_ttl_seconds.description: When set, enables cross-query URL/content-hash dedup so a re-add of an unchanged page is a no-op within the TTL.

chunk_strategy.description: How Markdown is split into passages before indexing: heading-aware (split on Markdown headings, then size-bound) or fixed-size windows.

chunk_max_chars.description: Upper bound on a passage's character length.

chunk_overlap.description: Character overlap between adjacent fixed windows.

markdown.description: Full clean Markdown body, stored verbatim (never truncated).

content_hash.description: Hash of the normalized body; derived when null. Used for idempotent add on (url, content_hash).

id.description: Stable opaque id (deterministic from the canonical url).

deduped.description: True when this add was a no-op because (url, content_hash) was already present (idempotent).

text.description: The passage text, verbatim from the stored Markdown.

score.description: Relevance score, higher is better (BM25 negated to a positive number).

char_span.description: [start, end) character offsets of this passage within the document Markdown.

ordinal.description: Zero-based passage index within its document.

query.description: Free text; the adapter escapes FTS operators so an arbitrary query is treated as plain terms.

mode.description: bm25 is the default (FTS5 built-in, or the pure-Python fallback). vector/hybrid are opt-in adapters returning the same Passage shape.

total.description: Total ranked passages matched (capped at top_k).

backend.description: The active index backend id, e.g. "sqlite-fts5" or "memory-bm25".

PageDocument.description: The full document for a Layer-3 deep dive / resolve(id). markdown is the complete body, never truncated.

ResolveIndexEntry.description: Lightweight metadata about one held document, for the agent to decide what to expand (the GBrain resolver pattern: cheap index first, full content on demand).
